title: Purchase in the Apple store or a
text: Bought this for my son’s birthday and we happened to be in a mall where there was Apple store. He compared this one to the same product in the store and the sound quality was evident. The quality on the one purchased on Amazon was poor in comparison to the product in the Apple store. Would not recommend getting this product here.

title: Probably the worst Beats headphone I've ever owned
text: I've owned previous Beats headphones in the past and I've never had any problems with them. I figured I wanted to get a new pair so that I could use for work since I work remotely. I was excited to receive it and when I did, all I got was disappointment after disappointment. Let me start off by saying, they're following in the footsteps of Apple, smaller boxes means less things you get in the box. They didn't even provide the aux cord for direct connection to devices. So you basically either have to own one from previously or just spend extra money to buy one if you need it. The case that they give you now are just a complete downgrade from what they used to give you. They used to give you a sturdy case for the headphones to where you wouldn't have to worry as much if you accidentally dropped it or something fell on top of it. Now, they give you cheap soft case. Okay, enough about that, let's get to the headphones. The moment I took the headphones out of the case, I knew instantly, it

title: Should I buy these? Yes.
text: I always said I would never spend this much money on headphones. Then I saw they were on sale for Black Friday. My boss has a pair and he told me I wouldn’t be disappointed if I bought them. So I did. I am so glad I decided to buy them! They sound great. I love how you can pause, switch songs, and change the volume from just tapping the buttons on the left ear piece. I can also control them from my Apple Watch. Battery life is amazing. I love the little carrying case they come with too. I can use them anywhere in the house and not lose connection to my phone.

title: Worst return policy ever!😡
text:
3/11/2023 UPDATE… Not even a year has gone by barely 6 months and these headphones are already not playing correctly. Sometimes they play sometimes they don’t sometimes they’re loud sometimes they’re not you just never know in the middle of a song the volume goes up or down or just stops completely when I tried to return them they said that it had been passed the 90 days so now I’m just out $130 Will never ever buy this product again.
*****I bought these for my 21-year-old daughter to wear when she goes to work out at the gym she says the noise of the gym and the clinking of the weights is irritating her… But these earphones are her favorite and she really loves them and says they are perfect for working out! They are “great at counseling noise and stay on her ears without being too tight”!

title: Hands down, the BEST headphones ever!
text: I bought a pair for myself a few months ago and my kids kept wanting to "borrow" it all the time, so I splurged and got them both their own. My teen got the red ones and my 9-year-old got the black ones. I have the rose gold. These headphones are heaven. They are extremely well made and have amazing noise cancellation. The quality of sound is superb. They are comfy for both relaxing and working out. The battery life is the most impressive part. I use these every day, for about 2 hours while commuting and working out, and charge them once a month. No joke. They are THAT amazing.

title: If you have 3 kids these are a lifesaver!
text: I like to listen to my music pretty loud which I know isn't the best for your hearing. I love these! They last a long time and aren't super heavy to where if you wear them for over an hour or however long that your ears and head start to hurt. They are super sofa fitting to your ear, I truly do love these! The sound is AMAZING. Sometimes when I have my kids screaming at eachother I will put these on just to relax a little with my music.

title: Very Tight
text: The mic and speakers seem to be good but very hurting for ears. Very hurting. I may return for this main reason

title: not a impressed. Weak sound an not comfortable
text: If you knew me you would know two things, I live in my headphones and second im not an apple fan although i own an use their products every day. I never buy things because the name or hype especially headphones. Because i use them so much i usually just get some $30 over ear Bluetooth than usually last six or more months than i buy a new budget pair when they break. However since i been making some ok money and im addicted to online shopping i began to look at some brand name headphones. After looking at multiple top 5 lists for bluetooth headphones i noticed beats never made the lists. How can this be? Almost all of my clients that wear over ear headphones always have beats. I see them everywhere. Well since the top 3 where bose or sony’s that average $250-$300. This was a drastic leap for me so i figured i’d go halfway and see how much i like the upgrade before i make the jump. So when i came across beats solo 3 for only $129 i was curious. They certainly are pretty, slimmer than my

title: Kind of Small
text: This is probably perfect for a femaie or child... but they are kind of small for full size man and don't fully cover the ears and there is no noise cancelation because of this.  Still a nice item, just wasn't the right item for me.

title: $179 for what?!
text: I’m very disappointed. The headset is too tight and hurts my ears after 1 hour. They’re not loud at all. I feel like most of your money is going towards the cosmetic parts... I don’t understand how soo many customers rated this product 5 stars. Over-rated & Over-priced.

title: Fantastic
text:
I love these head phones. I found the rose gold was cheaper than the black and silver for some reason
I love rose gold, my I Watch is rose gold
The headphones are easy to use and set up Bluetooth and they sound great

title: Worst headphones ever
text: I had bought these headphones back in July and they are already breaking. The sound on the left side is cutting out. I tried disconnecting from my phone and reconnecting them thinking that would help but sadly it did not. I am very disappointed that these broke so quickly because I’ve never dropped them, water has never gotten on them, I don’t put the volume up that high so I know I didn’t blow the speakers. I would not recommend these headphones to anyone.

title: no charger with headphones
text: Did not get a charger with headphones..just got the cord.  Wish I would have known this before I ordered.  Charger i use for the earbuds did not fit

title: Meh. 2.5/3 stars maybe.
text: Right out of the box, after fully charged, only one speaker works, on a 15 hour trip:flights, one speaker is good other not good, sound is off and on. Tested on 5 flights total. Noise cancelling is not very good either. Lots of outside noise heard and filters through.

title: perfect for what I need
text: these are perfect for me I use them for listening to YouTube videos and phone calls primarily and occasionally ill play some music. im happy with them and give them 5 stars I do recommend! btw they aren't noise cancelling and I knew that upfront just wanted to note that for others.

title: I'm done with Beats.
text: Apple has officially ruined Beats. I used to love Beats. They were great.  I even liked the sound better than Bose. These, however, are far cry from what Beats once was.  The right ear only had sound when connected with an aux cable. Bluetooth kept having to be paired each time I used them. They were extremely tight on my head. Virtually zero noise canceling. Tech support acted surprised to these issues and very unhelpful, but upon some short research, I found them to be common issues. Sound quality is still good, especially to anyone nearby since there's practically no sound seal.  I eventually returned them and bought AKG wireless noise cancelling headphones (N60NC). They are everything the solo3 isn't. I love these AKGs. They are my new favorite headphone brand. I really like the AKG buds that came with my Samsung and the wireless Galaxy Buds by AKG, also. I'm done with Beats.

title: Amazing Quality & Sound!
text: It took me a year to decide to buy these, but once I got them, I wish I would have bought them sooner. The noise cancellation was is unbelievable. The sound quality is awesome. The battery lasts a long time in between charges. They also don’t take long to charge. My only disappointment was they charge by micro usb instead of usb-c. But I can overlook that for the sound quality.

title: Badass!!!
text: My brother listens to grindcore or old-school rap and R&B (I know, interesting combo). But he’s half deaf and needs it loud with fantastic base. These headphones are super comfortable when I tried  them on— I was impressed!! They totally take you away from the environment you are in! You won’t be sorry.

title: Not bad!
text:
Firstly, I must compliment Amazon! I ordered these at 1:00am and they were at my doorstep at 8:00am!

As usual, instant pairing to my iPhone, 2 iPads and iMac. I already have Beats earbuds, but, at times, I want the extra security of a headset. These are more flexible than the other headphones by Beats, and I don’t like the hard shell cases. At least this will fit in my lunch bag.

It’s just not as loud as I expected (which is why I gave 4s), but, I don’t need to completely tune out the world.

title: Great on ear headphones for price and portability
text: I bought these for my 13 year old son who is always listening to his phone or computer on his headphones. They are an excellent quality headphone and I was weary of buying into brands that become sometimes over hyped and overpriced. However, they connect easily via bluetooth and last for quite awhile. The one thing I would note is that these are on ear headphones as opposed to over the ear headphones which I did not k now to be a thing (caveat emptor). It does say it in the title so just beware that is the style for this model. That being said, the price is great considering some colors on this model sell for $300 vs $135 which I don't understand. But the bottom line is they are a good quality headphone for the price.

title: They’re Good But Not Great
text: I’ve used them about three times. They’re not that good for noise cancelling as other headphones I’ve used. Their battery is pretty good so far. It’s not big head or thick hair friendly. I wish there was an adjustment at the top too. Pretty color. Sound is good but not stellar. I got them on sale so they’re okay. Honestly don’t buy them full price. I wouldn’t. Still debating if I should return them.

title: ABSOLUTE TRASH
text: They stopped working at 4 months to the day despite always using the case. Not the least bit noise cancelling, and the sound quality before they stopped working was just meh. The return window is literally only 14 days from the purchase of the device, even though it took 8 days for them to be delivered. STAY AWAY!

title: If They Fit They'd Still Have Problems
text:
I didn't buy these here. Got them at my local T-Mobile.
First off, the sound is good. Really good. Maybe a little bass-y for me but not enough to send them back. It has paired up easily with a wide variety of devices. My iPad even shows me a picture and tells me the battery status. And now for the cons.
The fit isn't great. A little tight over the ears and then the strange part. There's a gap between the top of my head and the headphones. I always thought that's why God made adjustable lengths on these things. But since they held on so tight I let it go. But it really does seem like they'd only fit well on a girl with a very long very thin face. I am smallish and this is the first time anything has ever been anywhere near this tight before. But I usually buy Bose.
Then there was one annoyance too many. The faux leather or whatever it is that covers the ear pads started coming out of the seams it tucks into. Within a month. This is a few too many faults. The design flaws

title: My 3rd pair
text: I basically have all pairs of the beats I love them had to rebuy this pair cause my other ones still had the cord attached and they were way faded out but good comfort stays on my ears I can hear the music clearly and if you like bass it has a lot which is cool

title: First purchase was a dud, but replacements were great
text: The battery didn’t last long at all, so i returned these and ordered some more. The new pairs are nice for noise cancellation and for sound quality. The battery life on the other two sets i bought is really great, only having to charge once a week.

title: Lasted less than a year
text: Stopped working within 1 year. Wouldn't charge

title: I love them!
text:
From the first moment I put the headphones on, I loved them! I have original IPods (they are uncomfortable & have to charge frequently), Monster Ear Buds (one bud quit working after a short time. Before they quit, bass wasn’t very good.)

I purchased the Beats Solo Headphones. They are perfect! The sound is excellent. My favorite music is classic rock & I get quality speaker sound. I spend hours listening to music & watching concerts. I don't have to worry about one falling out of my ear.

If you want AirPods, make sure they fit your ears perfectly or the hard plastic design is painful. The Beats headphones are cushiony, reasonably priced with quality sound.

This is the best early Xmas present to myself! Rock on! ❤️🎶🎤🎸🎹🎶

title: Not at all worth the $$$
text: I’m incredibly disappointed in these headphones. The only thing remarkable about them is the price tag. The bass is nonexistent and they don’t block out sound - unless you could how tight and plastered to your skull they are as noise cancellation. Super bummed that these didn’t work - there’s probably some great value over-ear headphones that sound better.

title: Good…then the battery died,
text: I liked them. But one year later, after very moderate use, they stopped charging. I looked online and apparently there are options for DIY battery replacement but nothing supplied by Beats.

title: Nice headphones
text: I really love these headphones. They seem to charge very quickly, and the connect so easy to my iPhone! It pops right up on your iPhone or iPad without any issues. They do not say they are noise cancelling, but when I wear them I don’t really hear any outside noise at all! I think the sound quality is awesome! I bought these as a gift for someone and I also bought some for my husband and I when they were on sale! They come with a case which is nice, however I wish they had come with a hard case because the case is soft and I worry about them getting smashed. I will probably upgrade to a hard case at sometime. But I don’t regret buying these headphones at all!

title: Stopped working after 6 months.
text: After 6 months of use they will not hold a charge. I’ve tried resetting and updating but nothing works.

title: Not bad.
text: They came highly recommended. Not bad. I expected a great bass sound, didn't get it. But not bad overall.

title: A little tight
text: I bought these as a replacement for my blue solo3 which after almost two years the stuffing was coming out of the headphones, but the red ones seem to be a little bit smaller and are kind of tight on my ears. Still, they have great sound quality, and I love being able to walk around the house listening to whatever is playing on my iPad. They’re very useful, and the charge lasts a long time.

title: Decent but over priced
text:
Cons-> Noise cancellation is not that great, the ear part is not big enough & they are uncomfortable to wear for over 30 min, they hurt my ears (I have small ears), can’t activate Siri on my iPhone 11 while the headphones are connected to it, uses an old school android charger, case it comes with barely opens fully unzipped-_-.

Pros-> sound quality is decent, I don’t lose them they way I did my AirPods 😂, holds a decent charge (better than I expected aka better than AirPods).

Will update if I have anything else to add later.

title: Great sound quality and long battery life
text: I’ve only had these for about a week so I can’t speak to their longevity, but so far I love them! I don’t like in-ear headphones because they make my ears hurt after a very short time. I also don’t like wired headphones because they just get in the way. The sound quality on these is awesome. Noise cancellation is good I guess…I have nothing to compare it to. Battery life is great. I’ve used them every day and battery life is still at 100%. I also like the volume and play/pause controls ON the headphones. And the ear pads are super soft and comfortable for me. A lot of reviews say these are too tight and hurt your ears. This was the case for me too until I tried extending them a couple clicks past what I thought was the right size. That way the “pressure” goes more into your jaw instead of your ear. It’s WAY more comfortable. Try it!!

title: Great headphones.
text: Can't even hear my kids screaming and yelling.

title: Killer Battery Life
text: Battery life is beyond amazing. Went a full 3 weeks before having to charge them. And that was straight out of the package. That is just frankly unheard of.

title: child size, extremely uncomfortable
text: These are great headphones if you are a child or have an extremely small head. They were so tight and small they were impossible to wear for any length of time, so I had to send them back. Sound quality is great, and they work fine, but ouch! Impossible to wear if you're an adult!

title: Head squeezing torture
text: Like so many others the pressure on your head is akin to torture. Fat chance you can wear more than an hour.

title: So uncomfortable
text: Who I there right mind would buy these well I did and they are the most uncomfortable headphones I have ever had you better be sponsored if your wearing if not your heads gonna hurt after about half an hour. I have had dreams about how uncomfortable they are and I’m going around saying my head hurts and everyone else is showing me there headphones and letting me wear their headphones. Also I don’t have a big head so you can’t say that @beatsheadphones the only thing good is battery life so if you want to get these for your baby 👶 or have them on for the 30 second walk to your car stay away from these or at least this model

title: Authentic beats
text: Great now my son pretends as if he can’t hear me

title: Frustrating
text: The sound quality is nice, but getting the Bluetooth to connect and STAY connected is a pain!! Almost makes the sound quality not worth it. Definitely not worth the price in my opinion..

title: Not loud
text: I hated these they were not comfortable and they are not loud. I rather use my air pods

title: The Real Deal
text: After purchasing these I was terrified to get fake ones based off the reviews. I honestly believe I got the real deal. It came packaged in A cellophane wrapper. It has all the same markings of a real one & came with the charger people are saying they didn’t get. So, I have to give these beats 3 a 👍

title: With normal use one headphone stopped working - VERY disappointed
text: Doesn’t work after normal use in less than a month.  Very disappointed.

title: Beats solo3
text: Got it as a Christmas gift. I own a pair, good for the the gym.

title: Battery life alone is worth it - I hope they come out with sport edition for those who exercise.
text: I got these to replace my old beats plug in - my new iPhone 11 would not take them so I needed an upgrade and so I got the rose gold - to my surprise they came earlier than expected. They charged very fast to the full 40 hours and they LAST 40 hours - I would almost say longer.  The sound for me is great - but I like base - as Megan T. would say "It's all about the base".  I run every morning 30-45 minutes and I agree with a previous reviewer - the headphones can be difficult when sweaty - they are not designed for those who exercise.  I wipe them down when done and the white stays clean for me.  I would remove a star for that, but I really like them - despite that one flaw - so I won't. I hope they come out with a sports edition ... PLEASE.  For those who treble? Maybe not - but it IS THERE. I have some songs where it is prominent and can hear it fine.  And by the way.. my play list is 70s, 80s, 90s, 00s, 20s... so I am Varied :-)

title: Disappointed
text: These headphones aren’t as comfortable as I was hoping and they turn off if you are in temperatures below 40 degrees or are sweating. I bought these for outdoor running in the winter, to keep my ears warm, but they don’t work because it’s so cold. Disappointed.

title: Love our Beats
text: Wife needed new headset. I have been Beats fan.  Lucked out with Rose Gold which is one of her favorite colors and on sale for can't beat price. Look good. Sound great long battery life

title: Loud
text: Bought these for my son's bday. He loves these beats. Wish they would have black available.

title: Worth it!!!
text: These headphones are the best!!!! I got them on Amazon prime deal day and they were totally worth it. The sound quality is amazing and they are actually noise canceling. If you want a good quality pair of headphones then these headphones are for you! Overall, awesome and I would definitely buy them again!

title: Do Not Buy Refurbished
text: Not at all what the description shows, not the same color and definitely shows signs of use, not in Like New Condition

title: Be wary if you're looking for comfort
text: These clamp down like a vise.  After 30 min your ears are in pain. Do not compare to comfort of a bose or sony.

title: Love these! 🎧
text:
These are AMAZING!!
.. Especially if you love your bass. Quality pair of on-ear headphones 🎧 with more emphasis on bass then highs. Best if you like your dubstep, hip Hop or dance/rave music. Not really for the sophisticated listener that prefers classical/orchestrated tunes. Based on other reviews, I thought these would hurt my ears and be too tight creating pressure. Mine are actually quite comfortable; but then I don't have a huge head LOL. There is no true noise cancellation with these. Set up was quick and easy on my PIXEL 4a 5g phone. I downloaded the Beats app and like that it shows the battery percentage of the headphones on my screen. I love this feature so that I do not overcharge the headphones when they need to be topped up. These are meant to be used on an iPhone/Apple device, but they work just fine on Android. The battery life seems solid and with medium to low volume I'm sure you will get your 40 hours worth of listening time. These can also be plugged

title: Great sound quality
text: These headphones offer great sound quality and they are without a doubt noise cancelling. I cant hear anything else but whats playing in these headphones when I am using them. Great value, great quality, great overall product and I will continue to buy beats products in the future due to their high quality!

title: Very poor product keeps giving trouble
text: Very poor product.  Keeps disconnected and giving problems even after resetting it a couple times. Doesn’t work good at all. A $30 Jbl headphones it’s much reliable than this Beats Solo 3 headphones which I paid $100. Disappointed big time.

title: What a deal!
text: This was the perfect present for my husband who is a little hard of hearing so he really enjoys the headphones.  I can attest that they have excellent noise cancellation...he can't hear my conversation ..haha...but I know he's very happy with them...easy to use bluetooth to connect and the battery life is never questionable..

title: I like them
text: i really like them but i just wish the sound quality was a little better. i want them to be louder. overall i highly recommend these.

title: Outstanding!
text: I had some wireless headphones that recently broke and have been looking for a new one when I saw these.  SO glad I purchased them.  They are amazing!  The quality of product is the first thing I noticed, such as the soft ear phone (the last pair I had hurt my ears after awhile), the fit (my last pair kept falling off my head), and the sound is impeccable.  I wish I had purchased these sooner.  I highly recommend.

title: Work wonderfully and look great
text: These headphones are perfect for me!  Don’t have any issues with them being to tight like other reviewers have stated. They’re comfortable and they sound fantastic!  Would definitely recommend!

title: Solid headphones
text: I have no complaints about these!  Every so often, the bluetooth will disconnect, but that can happen to any device.  The sound quality is really good and the controls are very easy to navigate.  It isnt typical pairing, because you have to download the app, but once you do, its easy peasy!

title: Deal buy.
text: Great for the deal price. Best feature would be the battery life. 40+hrs

title: Do Not recommend!
text: They start to fall apart quick.

title: He's pleased
text: Was a gift for my 20 yrs old grandson,  he loves it.

title: Sound great
text: I bought these used, so I did not get the audio cord. However, they paired fine with my computer and smartphone and the sound is great, as it should be.

title: Really good
text:
Comfortable for long use.

Excellent sound quality.

Pairs easily.

Charges quickly and has excellent battery life.

I have nothing negative to say about these.

title: Perfect!
text: Bought these as gift. Recipient can’t say enough about how comfortable these headphones are.

title: Great sound and easy to use
text: Sounds is great and everything you would expect in a pair of Beats! They fold up pretty compact and have a nice carrying case to keep everything together. Greta purchase super easy setup and use.

title: Disappointed
text: Initially seemed good.  Then found out these don't work in below 32 degree temps.  Then the ear pad fell off.  Then the right side headphone stopped working.  Sorry, but for the price, durability was pathetic.

title: Great Earbud Alternative
text:
I’m a gym rat, and a regular runner. After many years, I have become aggravated and frustrated with my different earbuds (AirPod Pros and the Amazon buds, as of late). I don’t care for the sound, they never fit quite right, and the Amazon ones won’t connect to my Apple Watch.
So, I finally broke down and bought these over-ear cans. I didn’t want to be one of those guys at the gym wearing full-blown headphones - it’s always seemed to be kind of a “look at me” thing. But, these are as unassuming as headphones can be: low profile, no bling or adornments. They connected to both my iPhone and Apple Watch as soon as I turned them on. No opening Bluetooth properties, and all that hassle. And, the sound is great! I’ve worn them to the gym and running, and they’ve been surprisingly secure and comfortable. So far, I am quite impressed, and wished I had tried them before now. Let’s see how long they last…

title: Effective
text: Multi device use. Fast charging. Easy for travel.

title: Did not enjoy
text: There’s absolutely nothing special about these headphones. I bought them thinking they would be louder and better than my $20 headphones but they actually were worse. I am returning them and getting my money back!

title: Horrible pudding design
text: The padding size is very small, I would say it is a good size for 3-5 children. It hurts to use them.

title: Update
text:
This was a gift for my son, He wanted a headphone for awhile now. The headphones are great, great quality and I am glad I was able to get it for him at a reasonable price point for Christmas.

Update - As of February2021 the headphones have stopped working, no sound comes on when listening to them at all. I am very very disappointed it has only been two months since he received the headphones. It still connects to his laptop but no sound. This is actually the second pair of beats headphones that I have purchased that has failed. I will no longer support beats.

title: These are the best headphones! Great price. Came quickly for my son’s birthday.
text: Truly like the quality of sound

title: they hurt my ears

title: Works Great
text:
Bought for my son, he loves them.
He has a large head, and says they are comfortable.
He likes the clarity of the sound

title: my husband loves his beats
text: I like that it how's over the head and not stuck in your ear.

title: The sound is great.
text: Quality item. Worth the cost. Cheaper then beats but is a great it.

title: Quality Headphones
text: My son loves them, great for doing homework with other people around.

title: My Saving Grace from My New Piercings
text: I recently got daith piercings in BOTH ears and it makes earbuds a painful no-no. These are great for the sound provided. It cancels out noise very well when I need it but my only thing is that after a while the top of my ears get a little irritated if worn for a long period of time.

title: Christmas present for Mom & Niece
text: Mom & Niece love them. I was worried that they would be to bulky but they were not. Fit really nice.

title: He loves them!
text: Gave as a gift to grandchild and he loves them.  The sound quality is very good.

title: Awesomeness!
text: A friend recommended and I'm very happy with my purchase! Very comfortable and I can't believe hold long it holds a charge!?

title: BEST HEADPHONES

text: They adjust to your head. The sound quality is excellent  and you can control the volume as well.

title: Wayover priced can they make the on off button any smaller
text: Poor quality high price on off button is no small and you can’t really tell if it’s on or off it’s a pain

title: I love these!!!
text: I absolutely love these!!! I wear them everyday at work. The battery life is great!! I have to charge it like once a month. You can’t change the volume on them though, you have to do it on your device. If the auxiliary cord is plugged in you can’t use the microphone, you have to purchase an auxiliary cord with a built in microphone separately.

title: Love
text: These are very comfortable and sound is good.

title: Nice but hurts ears after a while...
text: I am a small woman and these barely fit my ears. The fact they are so small makes them a little uncomfortable if they shift. Maybe best for bigger kids?

title: Good phones

title: works better than  I expected on the laptop
text: works like advertised  connects to laptop great

title: Great headset
text: This is a really good headset to use with your phone. It’s adjustable and fits well over my ears. Good sound quality and volume control.

title: Sale influenced purchase
text: I know beats have good reputation but I’m not one to fall into “popular” brands I just look for quality at good price.  These went on sale and I so far very pleased with them.

title: I’m very happy with them!
text: I love them! They stay in place unlike most during gym time. Noise cancellation works very well.

title: They’re “okay”
text:
If you can get the STUDIO 3 , please opt for that one instead. I bought these on prime day to replace my studio 3 which broke after 3 years. They’re tight- I can’t imagine wearing them for hours and hours and hours. Just perfect for the gym or running.
The case is also flimsy, my studio 3 came with a hard case which I loved !
These are little okay and they’re sleek and cute

title: After 8 years of using Bose quiet comfort, these just...
text: Don't cut it. Bad quality of sound and cheap sounding.

title: Good for headphones ONLY. Microphone is BAD

title: GREAT

title: Loving it
text: Love this I use it to watch TV as I am hearing impaired. The sound is great, 40 hours of battery time. Easy set up, quick connection, perfection
